curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. Patch modifies only math/dec.go (plus tests, changelog, and go.mod). The vulnerability is in the maxDecBitLen constant which was computed as MaxBitLen + decimalTruncateBits (256 + 59 = 315 bits), misaligned with the 256-bit MaxBitLen used for Int types. This allowed Dec values outside the valid Int range. The patch replaces all BitLen-based checks with explicit upper/lower limit comparisons based on 2^256 * 10^18. Locations derived from patch diff — all 13 functions that contained the vulnerable BitLen > maxDecBitLen check are listed. No sibling files share the vulnerability pattern; int.go and uint.go correctly use MaxBitLen. L3 hints now differentiate from L1/L2 by naming the SDK math library and specifying entry vectors (parsing, arithmetic, deserialization). Vulnerability class integer-overflow confirmed: CWE-190 correctly maps, and the patch fixes a range validation misalignment that allows arithmetic overflow.
